market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: Spa Home with Pool, Hot Tub & Sauna for 4 Guests
5-Star Luxury Home: Pool, Sauna, Hot Tub Nearby
Exclusive 4-Guest House with Full Spa & Pool Features
analysis.rewritten_desc: Escape to this fully private 4-guest home featuring a resort-style swimming pool, hot tub, and sauna. Designed for ultimate relaxation, the property includes fully equipped accommodations for long-term stays. Despite the high occupancy rate of 70.7% booked in the next 90 days (26 nights available), its nightly rate of £2,296 reflects the premium amenities available. While the market median is £154.60, verified guests appreciate the spa experience and secure booking system (223 total reviews at 4.96). Located in a central area with proximity to local attractions, the listing provides an unmatched wellness-focused stay. Ideal for wellness retreats, private holidays, or special events, this home maintains high turnover despite its price premium. Note: For a seamless stay, additional amenities can be requested at the time of booking.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Prioritize the swimming pool in the first photo to emphasize the primary differentiator - the most impactful amenity for attracting premium bookings in this market segment.
key_diagnosis: Priced at +1385% above the cohort median (£2296 vs £154.60) while maintaining 70.7% occupancy, suggesting both pricing power and untested opportunities to increase occupancy through optimization
Missing 3 high-value amenity categories (Outdoor, Parking and facilities, Entertainment) that could increase booking conversion in luxury segments
Zero-word description leaves £2296 value proposition unexplained to potential guests - market context shows 70.7% occupancy despite the premium rate but lacks supporting narrative
analysis.outreach_hook: You're booking 23.9% more nights than the cohort average (70.7% vs 47.8%) but charging 1385% above the median rate - let's unlock higher occupancy by making your spa amenities more visible.
